title: elatostema adenophorum var. gymnocephalum
intro: Elatostema adenophorum var. gymnocephalum, also known as Chinese false nettle, is a plant species belonging to the nettle family (Urticaceae) and is native to East Asia. The Chinese false nettle is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chinese false nettle include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and aid in the treatment of respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
